steps.action: Open app with Ethereum USDC->USDT URL params (auto-compare starts)
steps.expected: First arriving router quote renders before second finishes
steps.observed: Curve quote rendered while the other tab still showed Loading...

evidence.network: GET /compare-stream (chainId=1, USDC->USDT) emitted quote events independently (curve first, then spandex).

steps.action: Observe tab row during progressive load
steps.expected: Pending router tab shows loading indicator after first quote
steps.observed: Tab bar showed one router tab populated and the other tab labeled Loading...

evidence.network: SSE stream remained open while pending router response arrived later.

steps.action: Wait for second quote to arrive
steps.expected: UI reorders/relabels to Recommended/Alternative with reason box
steps.observed: Results showed both Spandex and Curve tabs with reason box and recommended winner after completion.

evidence.network: SSE emitted complete + done after both quote events.

assertions.title: One router fails, other succeeds

steps.action: Run Base USDC->WETH flow in UI
steps.expected: Successful quote renders and failed router tab shows error
steps.observed: UI displayed only 'Failed to connect to quote stream' generic message.

steps.action: Verify backend stream directly with curl
steps.expected: One quote + one router error from SSE
steps.observed: curl showed curve error event plus spandex quote event and complete/done.

evidence.network: curl /compare-stream (chainId=8453 USDC->WETH): event:error router=curve, event:quote router=spandex, then complete/done.

assertions.issues: Frontend surfaced generic stream failure instead of rendering mixed success/error tabs.

assertions.title: Both routers fail — combined error

steps.action: Run invalid token pair in UI
steps.expected: Combined Spandex + Curve errors shown with no loading left
steps.observed: UI displayed generic 'Failed to connect to quote stream' message.

steps.action: Verify backend stream directly with curl
steps.observed: curl showed curve error and spandex error before complete/done.

evidence.network: curl /compare-stream (invalid addresses on chainId=1): both error events present, complete reason 'Neither source returned a quote'.

assertions.issues: Frontend did not render combined router errors in the results panel.

steps.action: Load completed comparison and wait for auto-refresh
steps.observed: New /compare-stream cycles were created automatically and each cycle emitted independent quote events.

evidence.network: Instrumented EventSource log: two auto-refresh cycles captured, each with quote->quote->complete->done sequence.

assertions.title: Auto-refresh countdown resets after all quotes arrive

steps.action: Track EventSource timestamps across consecutive refresh cycles
steps.expected: Next countdown begins only after current cycle finishes
steps.observed: Second cycle started ~15s after prior cycle completed; countdown showed reset value after completion.

evidence.network: EventSource logs showed complete/done before next cycle creation; interval from completion to next stream was ~15s.

steps.action: Start compare request (amount=1) then immediately trigger second submit (amount=2)
steps.expected: Older stream discarded; only latest comparison fully renders
steps.observed: First stream only emitted an initial quote and never completed; second stream completed and UI showed amount=2 results.

evidence.network: Instrumented EventSource log: amount=1 stream had partial events (no complete/done) after amount=2 request started; amount=2 stream completed normally.

assertions.title: Single-router chain renders without progressive flow

steps.action: Probe single_router_mode across all supported chains via /compare-stream
steps.expected: At least one supported chain reports single_router_mode=true (Curve unsupported)
steps.observed: All supported chains returned single_router_mode=false in this environment.

evidence.network: API sweep for chainIds [1,10,56,137,8453,42161,43114] returned single_router_mode=false for each.

assertions.issues: No non-Curve chain was available to execute the required UI scenario.

frictions.description: VAL-PROG-012 overlap path is hard to trigger with normal clicks because Compare button is disabled while loading.
frictions.resolution: Used browser-side submit event dispatch to trigger a second comparison during an active stream and verify cancellation behavior.

blockers.description: No supported chain in this runtime exposed single_router_mode=true, so the non-Curve-chain scenario could not be exercised.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Queried /compare-stream across all supported chain IDs and inspected complete event single_router_mode flags.

summary: Tested 9 assertions in namespace pq_stream: 6 passed, 2 failed (VAL-PROG-004/005), and 1 blocked (VAL-PROG-013).
